candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus shows conv=100% but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, treat the signal as UNVALIDATED and freeze entries — perfect live consensus with zero historical analog is a novelty trap, not a high-conviction setup.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: A 100% live consensus that has never co-occurred with the recorded historical patterns (green_matches=0) means the system has no out-of-sample basis for the win rate. USDJPY (16/30 bull) and AUDNZD (13/30 bull) both show conv=100% but hist_hr=0% — these are unprecedented configurations, and institutional flow under novel macro states (3.9% CPI, VIX rising 16.78→17.28, safe-haven JPY tension per L8) behaves unlike any backtested regime. Conviction measures internal agreement, not external reliability — TENET 3 demands the system know when it is operating without precedent.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_conv >= 0.95 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr <= 0.10: return ConsensusVeto('no_historical_analog')
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Drawdown reduction and Sharpe protection: filters out USDJPY/AUDNZD novelty-trap entries that would otherwise size up on false 100% conviction — estimated +0.02 to +0.03 Sharpe by avoiding negative-expectancy unprecedented-regime trades.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Current consensus: USDJPY dir=LONG conv=100% green_matches=0 hist_hr=0%, AUDNZD dir=LONG conv=100% green_matches=0 hist_hr=0% — both show maximal conviction with zero historical confirmation, while GBPUSD/EURUSD/AUDUSD SHORT signals carry hist_hr 66-72% with matching directional history. The Forex briefing independently flags NO_TRADE_TODAY, corroborating that today's configurations are non-tradeable.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 sets the USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate at 13; VIX is now 17.28 and rising, and both pairs are flashing conv=100% LONG with hist_hr=0% — confirm the VIX>13 veto is actually firing on these signals or the gate may be silently bypassed by the consensus layer.

reflection.system_health_note: Zero trades in last 7 days with regime=UNKNOWN, TradingView=UNKNOWN, and external sizing at 75% — system is correctly in a low-conviction holding pattern, but the absence of closed decision logs means all lessons remain harvest-only until trade flow resumes.
